executives.name: Marty Rendall
executives.background: Mr. Rendall has over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He joined Victoria Gold in 2007 and has served as CFO since 2011. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

board_of_directors.name: Susan Uthayakumar
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Uthayakumar is the Chief Energy and Sustainability Officer at Prologis. She previously held senior executive roles at Schneider Electric.
